title: Regulation Change Record
description: Defines an audit log entry tracking updates or amendments in regulatory policies, acts, or security frameworks.

id.description: Unique identifier of the policy update (e.g. reg_1234).

regulator.description: The administrative body responsible for the update (e.g. European Union, NIST).

regulation_name.description: Official name of the policy framework (e.g. EU AI Act, NIST AI RMF).

description.description: Detailed explanation of the policy changes and operational requirements.

affected_control_ids.description: List of system controls that may need revision as a result of this policy update (references ctl_1234).

created_at.description: Timestamp when the change was officially registered.

metadata.description: Custom key-value pairs for metadata extensions.
